post_title: 2025 Fundraising Benchmarks: 4 Takeaways to Strengthen Your Nonprofit Campaigns

images.alt: Bar chart showing nonprofit fundraising revenue in 2024 compared to 2023: most reported an increase, fewer reported a decrease or staying about the same.
images.section_heading: 2024 Digital Fundraising Performance at a Glance

images.alt: Chart showing nonprofit fundraising growth: median growth was 6% in both 2023 and 2024, but top 5% grew 215% in 2023 and 267% in 2024, indicating stronger gains.
images.section_heading: 2024 Digital Fundraising Performance at a Glance

images.alt: Line chart showing appeal campaign progress: 2024 campaigns (green line) raised funds faster and reached higher totals than 2023 campaigns (pink line) over 8 weeks.
Chart showing factors boosting appeal performance: matched giving multiplies fundraising by 3.7x, regular giving by 2.1x, and new donation forms by 1.6x.
images.section_heading: 2. Layered Fundraising Strategies Multiply Campaign Results

images.alt: Promotional graphic for the 2025 Fundraising Benchmarks Report, featuring trends, metrics, and predictions for nonprofits, brought to you by Raisely, Keela, and Aplos.
Two charts comparing 2023 and 2024: profile activation rates were similar (76% vs. 75%), but 2023 raised more per profile ($308 vs. $244) than 2024.
Bar chart showing 2025 nonprofit fundraising priorities: top focuses are donor acquisition, donor retention, and regular giving, followed by appeals and conversion rates.
images.section_heading: 4. From Acquisition to Retention: Value Over Volume

images.alt: Two charts showing one-off donation benchmarks: average donation increased from $110 in 2023 to $119 in 2024, while the most common donation amount stayed at $50.
images.section_heading: 🧭 Donation Benchmarks: Use to Guide, Not Compare

images.alt: Chart comparing average fundraising by campaign type: 2024 outperformed 2023 across donation forms, appeals, ticketed events, and peer-to-peer campaigns.
images.section_heading: 🧭 Donation Benchmarks: Use to Guide, Not Compare

images.alt: Promotional graphic for the 2025 Fundraising Benchmarks Report, featuring trends, metrics, and predictions for nonprofits, brought to you by Raisely, Keela, and Aplos.
